Scott Bruton

Senior Mechanical Engineer / Product Developer

Breville

Application - Senior Mechanical Engineer / Product Developer

Cover Letter

Dear Breville Hiring Team,

Having progressed to the final rounds of Breville's Senior Mechanical Engineer application at the end of last year, I'm writing again with continued enthusiasm for the opportunity. I'm a Mechatronics Engineer, with a Masters Degree in Biomedical Engineering, a Diploma in Software Development, and a love for product developing. I have over eight years of experience designing and engineering medical devices within the R&D, orthopaedic, and consulting space. This includes implant systems, prosthetics, surgical tools, and custom-built manufacturing equipment. While my background is in healthcare, I'm an inventor at heart. In my spare time, I enjoy creating everything from mechanical tools to smart software. Building and refining ideas is something I genuinely love.

Over the course of my last two roles, I've developed a strong working knowledge of materials used in both medical and food grade applications. I've been responsible for managing internal material databases and often work closely with suppliers, quality teams, and compliance reviewers to ensure selected materials meet functional, aesthetic, and regulatory requirements. I see this as highly relevant to Breville's products, which need to perform reliably, look great, and meet the expectations of everyday users.

I'm excited by the chance to explore something new, especially with a team that brings together engineering and user experience. I bring hands on design and prototyping experience, a solid understanding of product lifecycles, and a practical approach to solving problems. I work best in collaborative environments where good design, smart engineering, and real-world testing come together.

Thank you for considering my application. I'd love the opportunity to share more and see how I can contribute to your team.

Yours sincerely,

Scott Bruton

LinkedIn linkedin.com/in/scottpbruton
Address Sydney, Australia
Phone +61 (40) 6755 034
Email scottpbruton@gmail.com

Senior Mechanical Engineer / Product Developer

Passionate biomedical engineer and product developer with 8+ years of MedTech R&D experience, multiple engineering and IT qualifications, and a strong background in multi-language software development.

8+ Years Specialized in Biomedical R&D and Product Development Engineering.
My Goal & Focus Inventing, Designing, and Developing Products to Increase Quality of Life.
MULTIDISCIPLINARY Professional expertise across mechanical, electrical, and software engineering.

Professional Achievements

Technical Highlights

13+ Medical Devices 200+ Surgical Tools 4 Production Machines

MedTech devices designed and developed

Mechanical
  • Nitinol arterial stent (Class III)*
  • Tracheal stent (Class IIa)*
  • Canine femoral implant system*
  • Constrained liner and femoral head combination (Class II)*
  • Sinuplasty balloon dilation system (Class II)*
  • 200+ orthopaedic surgical tools*
  • Customised Femoral head retractor*
  • Knee replacement instrumentation and tray set*
  • Reverse shoulder arthroplasty instrument set*
  • Self-orienting femoral stem broach system (patent in progress)*
Electro-mechanical

Next-generation flagship contrast injector chassis (system integration) (Mechanical Lead)

Cardiac monitoring and ultrasound integrated display system (Mechanical Lead)*

  • 50+ unique components, with full tolerance stack-up analysis
  • User interface, electrical layout, and mechanical integration design
  • IP22 rated and IEC 60601-1 compliant
  • CNC, sheet metal bending, die forming, and overmolding manufacturing processes used

Stillborn Ultrasound Prevention System (Mechanical Lead)*

  • Portable ultrasound system
  • Mechanical integration of display and transducer module
  • Electrical

OculusID (Biomedical Junior Engineer)

  • UI/UX design implementing React, Electron, JavaScript, TypeScript with Python backend
Software applications

3D medical imaging iOS application*

  • Full UI/UX design, development, and deployment
  • Full Xcode generation and iOS integration

Jigs & machinery

  • Designed and manufactured the mechanical and electrical components for two 3-axis precision micro-gluing machines and a multi chamber UV adhesive-curing station*
  • SignaStretch ligament preparation jig*

Engineering & academic

  • Biocompatible and high-temperature polymer database for medical devices*
  • SolidWorks macros and design automation tools*

Honours: accelerated weathering system (85% grade - Top mark in grade)*

  • Thermal–UV decoupling via conduction, convection and fin design (Volkswagen)

Master's: tactile prosthetic fitment system (78% grade)*

  • Software, mechanical and electrical design
  • Ethics approval and clinical trials; hypothesis validated

* Sole designer & developer

Regulatory & Product Delivery

2 CE-Marked Devices 13+ R&D Med-Tech Projects 4 Implant Systems

Product & regulatory delivery

Regulatory & certification

CE marking and regulatory submission - Class II and Class III medical devices

  • 2 ENT balloon dilation systems & 2 implant systems

Internal regulatory audits across multiple devices pre-certification and submission

  • ISO 13485 and MDR compliance audits
  • Designed and executed pre-validation protocols for OculusID pupillometer
Project delivery
  • Cardiac monitoring and ultrasound system - concept through submission (2.5 years)
  • IEC 60601-1 design requirements and V&V protocol development
  • Multiple concept generation workshops and market research for rapid concepting and XFT alignment for project direction
  • 10+ Internal and formal design reviews for technical accuracy and regulatory compliance
Portfolio & lifecycle
  • 13+ product-development projects - concept through prototyping, testing, integration and regulatory readiness
  • Orthopaedic Implants and surgical portfolio expansion to support clinical and commercial growth
Operations & QMS
  • Product-tracking interface integrated into QMS - improved visibility and cross-department transparency
  • Designed and developed a JIRA and Clarizen application for automation of project management
  • Experienced in timesheets tracking (3+ years)

People & Leadership

10+ Engineers Mentored 4 Teams Led 10+ Cross-Functional Projects

Leadership & collaboration

Product & project leadership

Mechanical lead - cardiac monitoring and ultrasound platform; coordinated cross-functional team through to submission

  • Senior mechanical engineer managing 2+ team members throughout entire project
  • Coordination of cross-functional team on layouts, design reviews, and technical accuracy through to submission
  • Product lead - AI-based machine learning device for wet detection of inline IV components.
  • Product lead - OculusID handheld pupillometer
  • Managed junior product developers, stakeholders, timeline and budget
Technical mentorship
  • SolidWorks training sessions for junior product developers
  • Mechanical external reviewer on company projects
  • Day-to-day technical guidance - CAD, DfM, material selection, medical-device development
Cross-functional collaboration
  • Led multidisciplinary activities across mechanical, electrical, firmware, software, manufacturing and QA/regulatory
  • Bridge between disciplines through biomed, mechanical, electrical, firmware and software experience
  • Weekly client meetings - presented technical outcomes, risks, solutions and decisions
  • Trusted working relationships across engineering, quality, manufacturing, regulatory and commercial teams

13+ projects - early concept development through commercial and regulatory delivery
